general_advisory: Heat wave conditions are expected in upcoming days. Farmers are advised to take proper precautions. Protective measures should be taken for crops and animals. Keep harvested produce in a safe place.

advisory: Farmers are advised to store their crop in a safe place. After proper drying, grains should be stored in Super Grain Bag to retain the quality, texture, colour, aroma and taste of grain for longer period of time, extend the germination life of seed, control insect grain pests (without using chemical) etc.

Preparation of field for kharif crop production should be started with a deep summer ploughing. Some of the improved rice varieties such as Khandagiri, Sahabhagi Dhan, Mandakini, Naveen etc. should be recommended.
Farmers should start land preparation for cultivation of cotton crop.
Seed treatment should be done before sowing with imidachloprid 70 WG.
Spacing and fertilizer application guidelines should be followed.
Regular monitoring for sucking insect pests is advised.
Spraying recommendations for specific pests on Tomato, Brinjal, and Okra.

To protect the animal from heat wave, provide fresh clean and cold drinking water, green grass, protein-fat bypass supplement, mineral mixture and salt. Keep animals in shade and avoid working between 11 am to 4 pm. Deworming and vaccination should be ensured.
During heat wave period, ensure proper ventilation and cooling of poultry shed.
Continued feeding with supplements of vitamin E and C. Deworming and vaccination against ranikhet disease must be ensured.
